About Me

Here's some stuff about me as a person...

BIO

Hi, my name is Finn, and I make alright looking websites. The only qualifications I've got where handed to me on a sheet of paper in august for some exams that I didn't sit, the "unskilled work" market in the UK is in shambles, we are falling deeper and deeper into one of the biggest economic recession we've ever seen. Pretty snazzy if you ask me.

Here's some languages and technologies I can use:

HTML 5

CSS 3

JavaScript

Tailwind

Sass

Python

Node.js

Express.js

Git
